name: Canon EOS R5 Mirrorless Camera
description: Professional-grade mirrorless camera with 45MP sensor and 8K video recording. Perfect for weddings and high-end photography.

name: Sony WH-1000XM5 Noise Cancelling Headphones
description: Industry-leading noise cancellation and premium sound quality. Includes carrying case and charging cable.

name: Mountain Bike (Large Frame)
description: Rugged mountain bike with dual suspension and 21 gears. Ideal for weekend trails and off-road adventures.

name: Electric Scooter (30km Range)
description: Foldable electric scooter for city commuting. Features a top speed of 25km/h and built-in front light.

name: DeWalt Cordless Power Drill Set
description: High-performance drill with 2 rechargeable batteries and a set of 20 bits. Perfect for home DIY projects.

name: Pressure Washer (2000 PSI)
description: Powerful electric pressure washer for cleaning driveways, cars, and patios. Includes multiple nozzle attachments.

name: Professional DJ Mixer & Controller
description: 4-channel DJ controller with built-in sound card and dual USB ports. Compatible with Serato and Rekordbox.

name: Portable BBQ Grill (Charcoal)
description: Compact charcoal grill perfect for terrace parties or camping trips. Includes tongs and a cleaning brush.

name: 4-Person Camping Tent
description: Weather-resistant 4-person tent with easy-setup fiberglass poles and large mesh windows for ventilation.

name: Electric Guitar with Amp
description: Classic electric guitar with a 15W practice amplifier and guitar lead. Ideal for beginners and performance practice.
